basic_details.job_title: NEIAH Meghalaya Teaching & Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 21 Professor, Associate Professor and Posts
basic_details.organization_name: North Eastern Institute of Ayurveda & Homoeopathy (NEIAH), Shillong
basic_details.total_vacancies: Multiple Teaching & Non-Teaching Posts (Professor, Associate Professor, Specialists, etc.)
basic_details.short_information: North Eastern Institute of Ayurveda & Homoeopathy (NEIAH), Shillong (An Autonomous Institute under the Ministry of Ayush, Government of India) has invited applications for various Teaching and Non-Teaching posts to be filled on Deputation failing which by Direct Recruitment. This is a golden opportunity for eligible candidates in Ayurveda and Homoeopathy disciplines. The last date for receipt of applications is 17 August 2026. Find complete details including vacancy breakup, pay scales, eligibility, and application process below.

application_fee.details: General / OBC: Rs. 1400/- SC / ST / EWS: Rs. 700/- PwBD / Deputation: Nil

qualification.details: For Professor (Ayurveda / Homoeopathy): | PG Degree in concerned subject. 13 years combined teaching/research experience (with minimum 2 years in Level-12 + NPA). Minimum 5 research publications. Valid NTET certificate / Teacher’s Code. | For Associate Professor: | PG Degree in concerned subject. 9 years combined experience (with minimum 3 years in Level-11 + NPA). Minimum 3 research publications. Valid NTET certificate / Teacher’s Code. | Desirable for all: PhD in concerned discipline. | For Medical Specialists (Direct/Deputation): PG Degree + 7 years experience (for most specialist posts).

vacancy_details.details: Ayurveda Teaching Posts: Professor (Ayurveda): 05 posts (Rasa Shastra, Panchakarma, Prasuti Tantra & Stri Roga, Dravyaguna, Shalakya Tantra) Associate Professor (Ayurveda): 04 posts (Roga Nidan, Kayachikitsa, Kaumarabhritya, Samhita & Siddhanta) Homoeopathy Teaching Posts: Professor (Homoeopathy): 02 posts (Organon of Medicine, Case Taking & Repertory) Professor (Homoeopathy Allied Subjects): 02 posts (Surgery, Practice of Medicine) Associate Professor (Homoeopathy): 01 post (Materia Medica) Associate Professor (Homoeopathy Allied Subjects): 03 posts (Obstetrics & Gynecology, Anatomy, Physiology) Non-Teaching / Medical Specialist Posts: Obstetrician & Gynecologist: 01 Surgical Specialist: 01 Pediatrician: 01 Radiologist: 01

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-11 to Level-13 (7th CPC) + NPA as applicable
salary_details.details: Professor: Level-13 (Rs. 1,23,100 – 2,15,900) + NPA Associate Professor: Level-12 (Rs. 78,800 – 2,09,200) + NPA

how_to_apply: Download the prescribed Application Form from the official website www.neiah.nic.in.
Fill the form completely and attach self-attested copies of all certificates, testimonials, experience certificates, and recent passport size photographs.
Pay the required non-refundable application fee via Demand Draft.
Send the complete application through proper channel (for deputation) or directly so as to reach the Institute by the closing date.
Envelope should be superscribed with the name of the post and Sl. No.
Address: The Director, North Eastern Institute of Ayurveda & Homoeopathy (NEIAH), Mawdiangdiang, Shillong, Meghalaya – 793018
important_instructions: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Applications received after the last date or incomplete in any respect will not be entertained. The Institute reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process. No correspondence will be entertained regarding postal delay or rejection of applications. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Ayurveda Teaching Posts: Professor (Ayurveda): 05 posts (Rasa Shastra, Panchakarma, Prasuti Tantra & Stri Roga, Dravyaguna, Shalakya Tantra) Associate Professor (Ayurveda): 04 posts (Roga Nidan, Kayachikitsa, Kaumarabhritya, Samhita & Siddhanta) Homoeopathy Teaching Posts: Professor (Homoeopathy): 02 posts (Organon of Medicine, Case Taking & Repertory) Professor (Homoeopathy Allied Subjects): 02 posts (Surgery, Practice of Medicine) Associate Professor (Homoeopathy): 01 post (Materia Medica) Associate Professor (Homoeopathy Allied Subjects): 03 posts (Obstetrics & Gynecology, Anatomy, Physiology) Non-Teaching / Medical Specialist Posts: Obstetrician & Gynecologist: 01 Surgical Specialist: 01 Pediatrician: 01 Radiologist: 01

content_sections.heading: NEIAH Shillong Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: For Professor (Ayurveda / Homoeopathy): PG Degree in concerned subject. 13 years combined teaching/research experience (with minimum 2 years in Level-12 + NPA). Minimum 5 research publications. Valid NTET certificate / Teacher’s Code. For Associate Professor: PG Degree in concerned subject. 9 years combined experience (with minimum 3 years in Level-11 + NPA). Minimum 3 research publications. Valid NTET certificate / Teacher’s Code. Desirable for all: PhD in concerned discipline. For Medical Specialists (Direct/Deputation): PG Degree + 7 years experience (for most specialist posts).

content_sections.heading: Pay Scales (7th CPC)
content_sections.text: Professor: Level-13 (Rs. 1,23,100 – 2,15,900) + NPA Associate Professor: Level-12 (Rs. 78,800 – 2,09,200) + NPA

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NEIAH Shillong Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download the prescribed Application Form from the official website www.neiah.nic.in . Fill the form completely and attach self-attested copies of all certificates, testimonials, experience certificates, and recent passport size photographs. Pay the required non-refundable application fee via Demand Draft. Send the complete application through proper channel (for deputation) or directly so as to reach the Institute by the closing date. Envelope should be superscribed with the name of the post and Sl. No. Address: The Director, North Eastern Institute of Ayurveda & Homoeopathy (NEIAH), Mawdiangdiang, Shillong, Meghalaya – 793018

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Applications received after the last date or incomplete in any respect will not be entertained. The Institute reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process. No correspondence will be entertained regarding postal delay or rejection of applications. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee (Non-Refundable)
content_sections.text: General / OBC: Rs. 1400/- SC / ST / EWS: Rs. 700/- PwBD / Deputation: Nil

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NEIAH Shillong Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of application is 17 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many faculty posts are announced in NEIAH Shillong?
faq.answer: Multiple posts of Professor and Associate Professor in Ayurveda and Homoeopathy disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the pay scale for Professor at NEIAH Shillong?
faq.answer: Pay Matrix Level-13 (Rs. 1,23,100 – 2,15,900) + NPA.

faq.question: Q4. Is PhD mandatory for faculty positions at NEIAH?
faq.answer: PhD is desirable. Minimum qualification is PG Degree in concerned subject with required teaching/research experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for NEIAH Shillong Recruitment?
faq.answer: Rs. 1400/- for General/OBC and Rs. 700/- for SC/ST/EWS (Nil for PwBD/Deputation).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for NEIAH Shillong Ayurveda & Homoeopathy Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Download the form from www.neiah.nic.in and send the complete application to the Director, NEIAH Shillong.

faq.question: Q7. Is deputation allowed in NEIAH Shillong Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, posts are to be filled by Deputation failing which Direct Recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for NEIAH Shillong Application?
faq.answer: Self-attested copies of certificates, experience proofs, NOC (for deputation), and recent photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Will only shortlisted candidates be called for interview at NEIAH?
faq.answer: Yes, only shortlisted candidates will be intimated for interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form for NEIAH Shillong Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: The prescribed application format is available on the official website www.neiah.nic.in.
